response.justification: Over fifteen years of progressive full-stack experience with direct alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — well exceeds the 6-year baseline. The current role explicitly covers AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. The main gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned despite deep Node.js background), Python, and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, which are secondary concerns given the overall depth.
strengths: Primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) is consistently demonstrated across multiple production roles
Current position directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the role's AI agent development requirement
Strong and sustained TDD and testing culture — authored testing frameworks, organized TDD workshops, applied across every role
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere despite being the primary backend framework specified in the role
Python absent from skills list; Kotlin/Java experience is dated and limited to a single role ending in 2018
No explicit mention of authentication, authorization, or security-specific work across any role
